german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: Nearly half of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility issues.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead, But Technical Roles Close Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight gap indicates a competitive landscape for PM roles.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: The workforce is primarily composed of mid-level positions, with a significant share of 37%.

work_mode.title: Unclassified Work Modes Dominate Employment Landscape
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remain unclassified, indicating a need for clearer flexibility and on-site expectations.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 41% of roles demand AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
